data.value: 27-2 record and outright Big Ten champions. Led the nation in scoring at 89.1 PPG. Key transfers Yaxel Lendeborg, Elliot Cadeau, Morez Johnson Jr., and Aday Mara transformed the team.
Surged from +700 to +425 after defeating Michigan. Freshman Cameron Boozer averaging 22.7 pts and 10.1 reb while shooting 40.8% from three. A legitimate championship contender.
Defending national champions currently on an 8-game win streak. At +1100 they represent value given the defending champion pedigree.
Defense has been a drag on the Boilermakers who started as presumptive favorites. Only 5-5 over their last 10 contests. Tumbled from early favorites to +2500.
Defending national champions and overwhelming -270 favorites to repeat. The Huskies are on an historic run of dominance under Geno Auriemma.
Surged from +1200 preseason to +650 after going 30-2. Led by Lauren Betts and Kiki Rice, UCLA lost to UConn in last year's final and seeks revenge.
